system.name: Spectre
system.summary: Ecosystem manifest for @phcdevworks/spectre-ui-astro — Astro adapter for the Spectre system.

@phcdevworks/spectre-ui-astro.description: Astro adapter for the Spectre system. Provides Astro component wrappers that consume the Spectre UI styling contract and design tokens.
notes: Build-layer package. Depends on foundation-layer packages spectre-tokens and spectre-ui.
Astro component files (.astro) in dist/ are copied from src/ at build time — never hand-edit dist/.
Spectre packages are declared as peerDependencies in package.json; consuming applications must install them.

@phcdevworks/spectre-tokens.description: Design-token source for the Spectre system.

notes: Foundation packages may depend only on other foundation packages or external libraries.
Build-layer packages may depend on foundation packages and other build-layer packages.

boundaryConstraints.rule: No direct token value imports from spectre-tokens internals — consume via spectre-ui styling contract.
boundaryConstraints.reason: spectre-ui-astro is a build-layer adapter and must consume the styled contract, not raw token primitives.

preferredEntrypoints.task: use a pre-built Astro component from the Spectre system
add or modify an Astro component

generationRules: Astro components live in src/components/ — never edit dist/ directly.
Run npm run build after any component or type change to regenerate dist/.
Run npm run check before staging any commit — all checks must pass.
Component props must be typed; no untyped or any-typed component APIs.
usageGuidance: Import individual components via their named export paths (e.g. @phcdevworks/spectre-ui-astro/components/SpButton.astro).
Ensure @phcdevworks/spectre-ui and @phcdevworks/spectre-tokens are installed as peer dependencies in the consuming project.
Include the spectre-ui CSS entry points in the consuming Astro layout for correct styling.
safeDefaults: Do not bypass the spectre-ui styling contract by importing raw token values directly.
Do not hand-edit any file in dist/ — they are always regenerated on build.
Do not add component props that expose internal styling overrides outside the token system.
